mapper.select:
SELECT VA.Volun_Act_No AS volunActNo, VA.Volun_Act_Title AS volunActTitle, O.Organ_Name AS orgName, VA.Volun_Act_Recru_Begin AS volunActRecruBegin, VA.Volun_Act_Recru_End AS volunActRecruEnd, DATE_FORMAT(VA.Volun_Act_Proc_Begin, '%Y-%m-%d') AS volunActProcBegin, DATE_FORMAT(VA.Volun_Act_Proc_End, '%Y-%m-%d') AS volunActProcEnd, VA.Volun_Act_Point AS point,
/* 진행 상태 */ CASE WHEN NOW() < VA.Volun_Act_Recru_Begin THEN '모집예정' WHEN NOW() BETWEEN VA.Volun_Act_Recru_Begin AND VA.Volun_Act_Recru_End THEN '모집중' WHEN NOW() > VA.Volun_Act_Recru_End AND NOW() < VA.Volun_Act_Proc_Begin THEN '모집마감' WHEN NOW() BETWEEN VA.Volun_Act_Proc_Begin AND VA.Volun_Act_Proc_End THEN '진행중' ELSE '종료' END AS recruStatus
FROM TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY VA LEFT JOIN TBL_ORGAN O ON VA.Volun_Act_Organ_No = O.Organ_No
1 = 1
AND NOW() < VA.Volun_Act_Recru_Begin
AND NOW() BETWEEN VA.Volun_Act_Recru_Begin AND VA.Volun_Act_Recru_End
AND NOW() > VA.Volun_Act_Recru_End AND NOW() < VA.Volun_Act_Proc_Begin
AND NOW() BETWEEN VA.Volun_Act_Proc_Begin AND VA.Volun_Act_Proc_End
AND NOW() > VA.Volun_Act_Proc_End
AND VA.Volun_Act_Proc_End >= STR_TO_DATE(#{volunActProcBegin}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND VA.Volun_Act_Proc_Begin <= STR_TO_DATE(#{volunActProcEnd}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND ( VA.Volun_Act_Title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR O.Organ_Name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
OR VA.Volun_Act_No = #{keyword}
)
ORDER BY VA.Volun_Act_No DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY VA LEFT JOIN TBL_ORGAN O ON VA.Volun_Act_Organ_No = O.Organ_No
1 = 1
AND NOW() < VA.Volun_Act_Recru_Begin
AND NOW() BETWEEN VA.Volun_Act_Recru_Begin AND VA.Volun_Act_Recru_End
AND NOW() > VA.Volun_Act_Recru_End AND NOW() < VA.Volun_Act_Proc_Begin
AND NOW() BETWEEN VA.Volun_Act_Proc_Begin AND VA.Volun_Act_Proc_End
AND NOW() > VA.Volun_Act_Proc_End
AND VA.Volun_Act_Proc_End >= STR_TO_DATE(#{volunActProcBegin}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND VA.Volun_Act_Proc_Begin <= STR_TO_DATE(#{volunActProcEnd}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND ( VA.Volun_Act_Title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR O.Organ_Name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
OR VA.Volun_Act_No = #{keyword}
)
